full_text:
Mu Bing (Dexin) 沐並 (德信)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mu Bing (沐並), styledDexin (德信), was born in Hejian commandery. A poor orphan, became a man of strong principle, willing to face down powerful opposition. Mu Bing was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Mu Bing lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
